name: Blueberry Batter Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Oil or spray an 8 x 8 inch baking pan.
2. Put cleaned berries into the pan and sprinkle with lemon juice.
3. In a mixing bowl, cream together 1/2 cup sugar and butter.
4. Add milk alternately with flour, baking powder, and salt (mixed together).
5. Pour batter over berries.
6. Combine 2/3 cup sugar, cornstarch, and salt; sprinkle over top of cake.
7. Pour boiling water over all.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes to 1 hour.
